item.title: How it's done. From simple tools to specialized machines. Have a nice day !
item.description:
Painter's mitt.
Inflatable on-the-go light.
Tubing bending jig.
How to fit carpet around a column.
Smooth wall plastering.
Tire mounting and balancing machine.
Repairing a gap in laminate flooring.
Globe making from 1950s.
This process of creating a leather wallet.
Very strong blower
Silicone sealant.
Time-Lapse of Solvent-Based Paint Remover.
Hand-Stamping Leather.
Making a metal net.
Tube end closing via induction heating and shaping.
Mechanical scissors.
The little "engine" that could.
Cylinder head grinding or "Fly Cutting".
Forging metal cauldrons.
The Hyundai 10000 is a massive floating sheer-leg crane.
Automatic paper cutter in a printing press.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: State trooper deserves to be under the jail
item.description:
https://www.mprnews.org/story/2025/10/08/state-trooper-pleads-guilty-sexually-assaulting-baby As always, not a drag queen, Not somebody trans, nor lgbtqia. Another white person in power.
Seriously. At some point, the gas lighting from the conservatives needs to be addressed. How are we going to allow them to do things like this without actual repercussions? I'm also starting to regret moving the Minnesota. Other than Mayo Clinic, there really isn't much here. Just a bunch of people like this one and the picture. I have seen more swastika tattoos out here than I did in Virginia, which is also surprising. Especially since I live in what would be considered one of the more blue areas.
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: Welcome to America 2025
item.dc:creator: jee22

item.title: AI Art Dystopia
item.description: There’s so much wrong with this. The AI being used to find AI art, the mods insta-banning with no chance for fixing if there’s a mistake, blaming the artist for making art that got flagged without checking it wouldn’t, the mod’s attitude towards the artist, the unwillingness to work with the artist, the mod’s arrogance that the artist would want to come back after being treated like crap…

item.title: Wish me luck friends. And Jen.
item.description: I have an interview tomorrow with ‘Book with Jacob’ a scam artist with a decent set up, I’m recording the whole thing to make a pop-up video style edit for my son to help him spot fake interviews and hopefully realize how theatrical the internet can be. Edit: I will make sure to upload snippets and a link to what I make and follow ups. I’ll tag with “Fartface” if you want to look for it.
item.dc:creator: TranscendentMonkeyNutsRupturingAndReIeasingAVelociraptor

item.title: Perfect Blue Mima cosplay by YuzuPyon
item.description: Extended version here : https://youtu.be/-ACFFx9Ruqo I got last minute tickets to go watch one of my favorite movie of all time so I decided to speedrun putting this costume together in 4 hours! :) it was fun to vlog, the full video of the process and theater footage in on my Youtube channel! :) Perfect Blue is my favorite psychological horror movie of all time. It influenced many movies and directors afterwards, including western movies like Requiem for a Dream and Black Swan that have drawn lots of scenes and inspiration from it. It may seem like a paradox but the older you get the more intense a rewatch becomes in my opinion, at least that's how it felt for me. In my opinion, this movie is perfect in every way. From the way how real and unsettling its many topics are depicted, to the animation quality, to the general direction, this movie is truly a timeless masterpiece. I was really happy and honored people wanted to take pictures with me at the movies, but also seeing so much enthusiasm for the movie made me really emotional. People clapped at the end of the movie, which I never seen happen in theaters before! Have a good day, Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Are these foundational truths in the room with us now?
item.description: He knows what he is doing, and it will work on the set of people it needs to work on. Same reason why they have a banner on .gov sites informing people that democrats are responsible for the shut down, no serious person believes that statement but a set of people will. For the record, I’m ok with aligning with most of the groups he lists out. Any group opposed to the Republican Party has common ground with me,

item.title: GovBrief Today #257
item.description: Donald Trump should be basking in the glow of forcing a Middle East ceasefire. He was just in Egypt and Israel yesterday lauding peace. Today he threatened Hamas with a military attack, ordered strikes that killed six more people on a boat in the Caribbean without offering proof they were of any import to the US at all, and told New York City voters he would not allow the nation’s largest city to receive federal funds if the candidate he doesn’t like is elected in 3 weeks. He followed that by telling the people of Argentina he would end their financial support if they didn’t vote for his preferred candidate. On Wednesday, the Supreme Court could finish what he started by gutting the Voting Rights Act. There’s no carrot, only the one big stick that running the executive branch gives Trump. That’s why millions of people are taking to the streets this Saturday. Please attend the event most meaningful to you and take a stand against being bullied. We’ve come too far to return to a monarchy. And please don’t leave learning about truth to Big Tech algorithms. This free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/shapiro-assassination-attempt-plea [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-funding-threat-mamdani [3] https://go.govbrief.today/racist-republican-chat [4] https://go.govbrief.today/western-ak-storm-surge [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-argentina-visit-warning [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-spain-tariffs-nato [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-china-soybean-oil [8] https://go.govbrief.today/us-ship-attack-killing [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-hamas-disarm-threat [10] https://go.govbrief.today/alaska-flood-grant-canceled [11] https://go.govbrief.today/navajo-coal-bid-rejected [12] https://go.govbrief.today/arizona-ag-johnson-threat [13] https://go.govbrief.today/facebook-ice-page-removal [14] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-media-policy-begins [15] https://go.govbrief.today/visas-revoked-kirk-posts [16] https://go.govbrief.today/nuclear-power-army-janus [17] https://go.govbrief.today/contractor-charged-records-removal [18] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-violated-fema-grants [19] https://go.govbrief.today/la-immigration-state-emergency [20] https://go.govbrief.today/judiciary-jordan-smith-testimony [21] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-kirk-medal-awarded [22] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-complains-time-cover [23] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-trump-land-transfer Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
